scope: Extend ActivationMigration semantics so clean vector state is explicitly rehomed across harts
Drop the old source VectorState so it becomes historical after migration
Create a migrated VectorState live-owned by the activation generation after migration

findings_fixed: ActivationMigration rejects dirty vector contexts instead of moving unsaved vector state
ActivationMigration rejects pending saved-context migration in this checkpoint to avoid hidden saved-context generation rewrites
ActivationMigration vector refs are validated as historical evidence so later ActivationContext generation advances do not invalidate old migration records
The old source VectorState is dropped on migration so it cannot remain a live edge to activation@old-generation
The migrated VectorState is a separate ObjectRef live-owned by activation@new-generation
osctl activation-migration ViewV1 and history graph expose stable vector migration refs
bad_smells_checked: No raw vector register payload is stored
No hardware vector restore path was added
No target-side cwasm execution path was added
No substrate mapping is treated as semantic truth
residual_notes: Pending saved-context cross-hart migration is rejected in V9 and can be expanded only with explicit SavedContext migration semantics

validation_commands.command: target/debug/osctl graph --history --json target/aotc/wasmtime/host-validation/debug/semantic-package-v1.json | jq '.edges[] | select(.from.kind=="activation-migration" and .from.id==9080 and (.relation=="source-vector-state" or .relation=="migrated-vector-state"))'

residual_gaps: Pending saved-context vector migration is intentionally rejected until SavedContext migration semantics are modeled
